title: Diagnose, repair and replace heavy vehicle electronic management, monitoring and tracking systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose, repair and replace heavy vehicle electronic management, monitoring and tracking systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose, repair and replace electronic management, monitoring and tracking system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify information required for inspection, servicing, repair and replacement activities from customers and supervisors1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with the activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and electrical equipment required for diagnosis and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify information required for inspection, servicing, repair and replacement activities from customers and supervisors1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with the activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and electrical equipment required for diagnosis and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify information required for inspection, servicing, repair and replacement activities from customers and supervisors1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with the activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and electrical equipment required for diagnosis and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to diagnose, repair and replace electronic management, monitoring and tracking system

elements.title: Diagnose electronic management, monitoring and tracking system

pcs.text: Implement diagnostic tests according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Analyse diagnostic test results and identify cause of fault 2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault to supervisor according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement diagnostic tests according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Analyse diagnostic test results and identify cause of fault 2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault to supervisor according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement diagnostic tests according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Analyse diagnostic test results and identify cause of fault 2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault to supervisor according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Diagnose electronic management, monitoring and tracking system

elements.title: Repair and replace electronic management, monitoring and tracking system

pcs.text: Identify information required for repair and replacement activity3.2 Identify required tools, equipment and materials required for repair and replacement activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.3 Carry out repairs and replacement according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer component specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Carry out post-repair and replacement testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify information required for repair and replacement activity3.2 Identify required tools, equipment and materials required for repair and replacement activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.3 Carry out repairs and replacement according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer component specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Carry out post-repair and replacement testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify information required for repair and replacement activity3.2 Identify required tools, equipment and materials required for repair and replacement activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.3 Carry out repairs and replacement according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer component specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Carry out post-repair and replacement testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Repair and replace electronic management, monitoring and tracking system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle has safety features and cowlings in place and systems are ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Check tools and equipment and tag and isolate any faulty electrical equipment identified according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle has safety features and cowlings in place and systems are ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Check tools and equipment and tag and isolate any faulty electrical equipment identified according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
